title: Image Metadata Schema
description: Schema for image.json - Global metadata for image assets in TAO DAFT format metropolis-v3.0

version.description: Schema version - must be '3.0' for this schema

rectified.description: Whether the image has been rectified (lens distortion corrected)

scenario_info.description: Information about the image capture scenario, environment, equipment, and purpose
examples: Smart city intersection - traffic monitoring snapshot

caption.description: Textual description of the image content
examples: Warehouse aisle with forklift carrying pallet, worker in high-visibility vest walking nearby
Urban intersection with stopped vehicles at red light, pedestrian crossing in crosswalk

camera_id.description: Reference to camera ID in calibration.json for accessing intrinsic/extrinsic parameters

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when image was captured

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

description.description: Human-readable description of this annotation file

license.description: License under which this annotation is distributed

tags.description: List of tags for categorization and search

examples.scenario_info: Warehouse operations - safety inspection photo captured from overhead camera
examples.caption: Wide view of warehouse aisle with yellow forklift carrying wooden pallet. Worker in orange vest and yellow hard hat walking perpendicular to forklift path. Multiple shelving units with boxes in background.
Four-way intersection with vehicles stopped at red light, pedestrian in crosswalk
